name: multi-turn-simplify
messages: Show GDP, population, life expectancy, and CO2 by country colored by continent
This is too busy, simplify it
rubric: Final chart must be simpler than the first attempt — fewer dimensions encoded, fewer marks, or a clearer layout. Should still be a valid, readable chart. Acceptable simplifications: fewer variables, faceting instead of overloading, or focusing on the most important relationship.
